summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Local Recruitment ATS application. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI functional with proper navigation, job creation, and processing flows. AI-powered resume parsing via Gemini integration operational.
passed_tests: Stats API - returns correct structure with job/candidate counts
Job Creation API - AI parses JD and extracts skills successfully
Jobs Listing API - returns jobs with required fields
Resume Processing API - processes files and calculates match scores
Candidates API - returns candidates with match percentages and categories
Candidate Update API - allows updating CTC, notice period, response, remarks
Excel Export API - generates and downloads Excel tracker file
Candidate Filtering API - filters by category (Shortlisted/Hold/Rejected)
Job Deletion API - removes job and associated candidates
Dashboard loads with stats cards displaying correct values
Navigation sidebar works on desktop and mobile
Job creation form opens, accepts input, and creates jobs
Jobs listing page displays created jobs with AI-extracted skills
Process resumes page shows job selection and file upload interface
Candidates page shows filtering and search functionality
Mobile responsive design with working hamburger menu
Excel export buttons present and functional

success_percentage.ai_features: 100% (Gemini AI parsing jobs and resumes successfully)
